content:
type: REVISE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
your_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Our features both extend Image.save() in the same file, so a disjoint file split isn't possible. Proposal: we both keep these files, but make strictly additive changes - I'll add a dry_run=False kwarg that short-circuits before the actual disk write/fp handling near the end of save(), without touching unrelated lines. Please do the same for your backup param (e.g. only add new code, avoid reformatting or reordering existing lines) so our diffs don't collide. For tests, I'll only append new test functions/methods to test_image.py, not edit existing ones. Agreed?
